x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service Portal is a primary delivery channel for Now Assist self-service AI features. Unconfigured or inactive portals prevent Now Assist from surfacing AI search, suggested articles, and virtual agent to end users.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Verify active Service Portals via sp_portal_list.do. Ensure Employee Center or Service Portal is configured and accessible. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent require an active portal for end-user delivery.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_47f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c33
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Service Portal is a primary delivery channel for Now Assist self-service AI features. Unconfigured or inactive portals prevent Now Assist from surfacing AI search, suggested articles, and virtual agent to end users.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Service Portal Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sp_portal');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active Service Portal(s)';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active Service Portal(s) configured. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent can deliver self-service AI features to end users.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active Service Portals configured. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent require an active portal to deliver self-service AI features to end users.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000491</number><order>120</order><remediation_guidance>Verify active Service Portals via sp_portal_list.do. Ensure Employee Center or Service Portal is configured and accessible. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent require an active portal for end-user delivery.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>47f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c33</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Service Portal Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_47f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c33</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
